title: cymbidium ensifolium var. haematodes
intro: Cymbidium ensifolium var. haematodes, also known as the Cinnamon Orchid, is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the orchid family. It is primarily used in traditional Chinese medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Cymbidium ensifolium var. haematodes include reducing fever, relieving coughs, and alleviating respiratory issues, making it a popular herbal remedy for respiratory infections. Herbal preparations of Cymbidium ensifolium var. haematodes typically involve boiling the plant in water to create a decoction or infusion, which can be consumed as a tea to reap its medicinal benefits.
